name: doc-quality-blank-acroform
anchor: Doc quality axis: blank AcroForm template uploaded
rationale: Broker uploads the blank loan application template PDF without filling any fields (common error — broker forwards the form to borrower for filling but accidentally re-attaches blank version when submitting). pdf-parse extracts form-label text only; no canonical-field values present. Expected: Vienna detects empty intake content + escalates to broker or admin handoff.
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture copies the actual blank forms/Loan Application Form (1).pdf template — exactly what a broker uploading a blank form would send.
